hooks.command: git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && printf '{"systemMessage":"You have uncommitted changes — consider committing before closing."}' || true

git fetch origin main 2>/dev/null; C=$(git log HEAD..origin/main --oneline 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$C" ] && jq -n --arg c "$C" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"SessionStart",additionalContext:("This repo has updates available on origin/main:\n"+$c+"\nTell the user updates are available and ask whether to pull them with git pull before doing other work; wait for their answer.")}}' || true
